_comment: Tests booking-verb routing, per-unit pricing guard for anti-wrinkle (synonym 'botox'), and service synonym resolution for Med Skin clinic.

scenarios.name: Booking verb after info answer routes silently via info_answered

history.content: HIFU — High Intensity Focused Ultrasound — tightens and lifts skin by delivering focused energy to deeper tissue layers, stimulating collagen production. We offer this as the Liftera HIFU Facial and Neck treatment. Did you have any other questions?
That sounds great, I want to make an appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if node calls universal_router with intent='info_answered' and zero spoken output. FAIL if node says 'I'll book that for you', asks for a date or name, or produces any spoken text this turn.

scenarios.name: Botox per-unit price question triggers complimentary consultation offer — no smart_voice_agent call

history.content: How much per unit for botox?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if node invokes the ANTI-WRINKLE PER-UNIT GUARD: speaks that product and pricing details are covered at the initial consultation and that the first consultation is complimentary, then asks if the caller would like to book one. FAIL if node calls smart_voice_agent to look up the price, or states a price per unit.

scenarios.name: Synonym 'dysport' resolves to Wrinkles and Lines — price looked up correctly
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if node resolves 'dysport' to 'Wrinkles & Lines' (resolved_id=1706874590543750904), speaks the cue phrase, and calls smart_voice_agent with intent='get_service_price' and the correct appointment_type_id. FAIL if node treats 'dysport' as out-of-scope, or calls smart_voice_agent without an appointment_type_id, or fires the per-unit guard (the question is about total price, not per-unit).
